VALUES ('a1402b6f-f3fb-4ec9-a7c1-2bdc847ff45d', 'builder', 'RingCentral Telemetry Integration and Security', 'Using the batch account presence endpoint (/presence) is far more efficient than individual queries for agent status checks.
